stemHtml: Which statement about the storage capacity of a battery is correct?

options.a: 5 Ah means that the battery will deliver 5 amperes for 1 hour.
options.b: 20 Ah means that the battery will deliver 20 amperes for 10 hours.
options.c: 20 Ah means that the battery will deliver 10 amperes for 20 hours.
options.d: 5 Ah means that the battery will deliver 10 amperes for 10 minutes.
